summary: FR-SLOT-07A Task Slot Apply A: explicit apply turns a due-task slot candidate into one scheduled Cairn block event. POST /api/tasks/:id/schedule-block validates strict body, revalidates eligibility (404/409 NOT_ELIGIBLE), rejects active block (409 TASK_ALREADY_SCHEDULED) and stale slots after recompute (409 TASK_SLOT_STALE), then in ONE transaction inserts the event (type=task, mode=async, source=cairn, self_imposed=1, status=planned, title/thread from task) and updates ONLY tasks.scheduled_event_id; 201 {task,event}. Migration 0008 adds nullable scheduled_event_id (ALTER ADD COLUMN inline FK, no rebuild). Active-block tasks (event live: start/end + cairn + self_imposed + status planned|confirmed|done) are excluded from Today prompts; cancelled/moved/missing resurface. Task status/due/estimate/optional/thread never mutated; no links. Frontend candidate rows become explicit apply buttons (copy: creates a block, not done) resending the captured date/now/days. Committed 9fc7c8c.
